target: 11. Fans Rushing In
July 24
Shinpei Ajiro

Mio, two A lunches.
Take them.

Yeah!
Next, four C lunches, please!
Oh, oh.
Thank you!
(This is a huge rush without any restraint…)
Fuh~…

Hey, Shin.
Don't yawn so much in the store.

If the customers see you,
what'll you do?
Ugh… sorry.

You don't sleep much, do you?
You said to go to bed early.

I really wanted to,
but I don't know when Mio's shadow will come…

Maybe…
You stayed up because of that?
Yeah.

…You'll get sick.
Don't overdo it.
I'll be careful too.

Four C lunches, done!
Take them.
Yes!
Huh, there seem to be a lot of tourists today?

Yeah… I think this is the first time
it's been this busy.

Tourists usually come during the summer festival,
but this year's way busier than usual.

Ugh~~,
it's so hot~~.

――what's this!?
It's super crowded!

Totsumura, you're here.
The counter's free.

Thanks, Mio.
I'll have the usual…

Dad~,
B lunch, with fried shrimp added
and a medium rice bowl.
You look really tired.

It's been a nightmare today!
Tourists have been pouring in
since morning!

Every year at this time,
we prepare for the tourist surge
with the town hall staff…

But this year's way beyond normal!
I'm so busy…
Totsumura-san, that's probably…

Ah, I already figured it out.
The reason there are so many tourists
is probably…
Kaori's fans!
I thought so…
Just like Karikiri said.
――Hey, a message?
Could it be Kaori?

Ah, seems like it.
Umm…
What was the message about?

The rehearsal today
is canceled.
Eh… really?

There are so many fans
that they can't go out easily.

Then this time, no rehearsal
and straight to the performance.
Is that okay…?

(From the message just now…
 Kaori's probably really down)

Since the customers are also
leaving, Mio, I'll call Kaori.

If you're going to call,
tell her I'm supporting her.
Ah, got it.
Hello, Kaori?
Ah… Shinpei?

I saw the message.
Is the concert today okay?

Thank you for worrying.
But there's a problem…
What happened?

The secret concert venue isn't just
on Hitogashima Island,
but also the hotel I'm staying at…
They even found out the room number…
What!?

Right now, I'm staying at the shrine office
because of Karikiri's kindness.
I'll stay here until the concert.
I see…
"Since it's a shrine, it's safe."
"Security items are important."

Since it's a shrine, it's safe.
You can move to the stage quickly too.

Yeah.
Karikiri's been talking a lot,
and it's been fun.

Ah…
He talks too much, doesn't he?

Hehehe… Maybe.
But he's an interesting person, Karikiri.

He said he doesn't have anyone to talk to
about Tokyo stuff normally,
so we ended up having a good time.

I see…
Well, as long as you're having fun, that's great.

But if it gets too long,
cut it short, okay?
He won't get angry.

Hehe, I'll do that.
If it gets too hard, I'll stop.

Security items are important.
Since it's a shrine, it's probably safe,
but it's better to be prepared.
Yeah, don't worry about that.

Actually, the manager's policy
is to wear security items during concerts
every day.

Oh, really?
Then that's reassuring.

Hehe, you're starting to sound
like the manager.

But… I'm sorry.
I wanted to let you and Mio
watch the rehearsal.
No, it's not your fault.
But I know you were looking forward to it…

It's okay.
I and Mio still want to support you.
Eh…

No matter what happens,
I'll support you,
and I'll come to the concert too.
So don't lose.

No matter how unexpected things get,
make this concert you aimed for
a success on this island.

Yeah, that's right…
That's why I came back.

I'll make it happen.
Watch me, Shinpei.

Ah, I'm looking forward to it.
Anyway, since we have time,
take it easy until the performance.
Yeah… I will.

Thank you for calling…
I'm glad I could hear your voice.
I'll talk to you later!
Ah, talk to you later.

(Who would've thought they'd track down
the room…)
(But more tourists aren't all bad.)

(The more people on the island,
the harder it is for the shadows to hide,
limiting their movements.)
(But I can't let my guard down…)

(If Kaori's concert is successful
and everyone makes memories of the festival,
that'd be great.)
